name: runesmith-cc
description: [RuneSmith] Builds the {PROJECT}.cc/ Claude Code monorepo head at your workspace root: CLAUDE.md constitution, .claude/ scaffolding (skills, commands, agents, hooks), comms/ folder for Cowork-CC exchange, and marker files. Optionally creates new GitHub repos or clones existing ones using a PAT from .credentials. Idempotent — safe to re-run as you add repos.
